plugins.name: agentera
plugins.description: Compound agent orchestration suite - 12 capabilities in one bundled skill; exact bare hej uses the Agentera dashboard path

agentera.singleSkillInstall: Single-skill installs keep core SKILL.md workflow behavior; suite tools are bundle-only enhancements.

plugins.name: hej
plugins.description: Legacy Agentera v1 explicit /hej bridge to the v2 /agentera upgrade flow; do not use for bare text hej.

agentera.singleSkillInstall: Legacy bridge installs only redirect users to the suite upgrade flow.
